cfg.debug.tooltip:
If true, logs friendship changes to the SMAPI console.
Useful for verifying decay settings.
cfg.adaptive.tooltip:
If enabled, uses the daily schedule below.
If disabled, uses Constant Mode.
cfg.constant.title: Constant Mode
cfg.adaptive.title: Adaptive Schedule
cfg.adaptive.note: Settings below apply only if Adaptive Mode is ON.
opt.decay.tooltip:
Multiplier for friendship decay.
0% = No Decay.
100% = Normal Decay.
opt.talk.tooltip: Extra friendship points added when talking to an NPC.
opt.gift.tooltip:
How many extra gifts allowed per day (0-10).
0 = Vanilla Limits.
2 = Vanilla + 2 Extra.
